# subscript(_:)

**Instance Subscript**

Accesses a slice from a range of indices.

## Declaration

```swift
subscript(bounds: Range<Int>) -> Slice<DataFrame.Row> { get set }
```

## Parameters

- **bounds**: A valid column index range.
